name: Time Quiz
author: Poki
description: Time Quiz is a game in which you are asked questions about different events and you have to guess the correct time period of these events as accurately as possible. Be careful though: As the events get older, the questions get harder. Can you score higher than all your classmates? How to play: Resize and move the answer bar to encompass the desired years. About the creator: Time Quiz is created by Gamerce , the team behind Swipe Fighter Heroes , Jumping Jaxx and Killer Snake . They are based in Denmark.
